Subject: Website redesign - feedback on mockups
Date: Wed, 8 Apr 2026 11:05:00 -0700

NOTE: This is an AI-generated test document, it's not real, and any resemblance to real people or places is coincidence.

Hi Jordan,

Dr. Patel and I looked over the three homepage mockups you sent for the practice
website redesign. We both liked Option B best — the calming blue-green palette and
the big "Book an Appointment" button at the top.

A couple of changes:
- Dr. Patel would like his bio and credentials moved higher on the About page, above
  the associate dentists' bios.
- We need a HIPAA-compliant contact form since patients sometimes mention medical
  history when requesting appointments. Can you confirm the form vendor you're
  planning to use supports that?
- Our office manager before Linda (that's me!) used to handle the old WordPress site,
  but none of us know the login anymore. Is that something you can help recover, or
  do we start fresh?

We're hoping to launch before Dr. Patel's practice anniversary event on May 20th if
that's realistic given everything above.

Thanks,
Linda Osei
Office Manager, Patel Family Dental
